scope: Project-level reusable multi-state character identity board for Helian Xuedai as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard whose bear-clan identity is carried by oppressive face structure, white sideburn and nape fur, huge clawed hands, heavy body scale, claw markings, and shield-axe equipment rather than cute bear ears.

locked_references.role: user-corrected high-ranking white-bear-clan guard character lock
contrast reference: Helian Xuedai must be heavier and bear-clan, not Frosthoof deer or Lu Mi in different clothes
northern bonewood, fur, rawhide cord, and wind-worn bone material reference
locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem reference only; do not redesign
northern object-symbol extension reference; use bear-claw cuts, bonewood knots, rawhide cord, and oath-cord language without creating a new badge

High-ranking white-bear-clan female guard design lock

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
The Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem is locked; do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Helian Xuedai logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, or modern mark.

Helian Xuedai must read as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard without relying on prominent bear ears: bear identity comes from oppressive brow-cheek-jaw structure, claw-shaped facial markings, white sideburn and nape fur, huge clawed hands, heavy guard body, and shield-axe equipment.

Do not make her a bear-faced beast head, low-ranking tribesperson, Frosthoof deer, Lu Mi costume variant, shaman, generic human with bear-ear decoration, soft doll-faced noblewoman, cute animal girl, or cute mascot.

Do not use prominent round fluffy bear ears, teddy bear ears, headband ears, pom-pom ears, hair-bun ears, or costume ears as the identity cue. If ears are visible, they must be low, small, scarred, and partly hidden.

Face and eyes must preserve high-ranking female warrior pressure: heavy brow, compressed cheekbones, strong jawline, broad cold-darkened nasal plane, firm mouth, narrowed predatory eyes, and calm murderous restraint.
Preserve white bear fur mantle, silver-black bone-iron armor, bronze bracers, bone-iron shield, guard axe, jade clasp, red oath cord, large hands, short claws, and ice-stud boots.
No deer ears, deer antlers, deer markings, shaman flute, herb pouch, or ice-blue ritual fire focus.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
